---
title: "Rock Nitrogen"
author: "Rebecca Martinez"
date: "November 14, 2025"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
  html_document:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Set global options for all chunks
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,     # hide code
  warning = FALSE,  # hide warnings
  message = FALSE,  # hide messages
  error = FALSE     # hide errors
)

#install.packages("tidyverse")
#install.packages("gt")
#install.packages("flextable")
#intall.packages("janitor")
#install.packages("cowplot")
#install.packages("paletteer")
#install.packages("tidytext")
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor) #clean data 
library(gt)
library(flextable)
library(cowplot) # plots into objects, insert objects to make grid
library(paletteer) #color pallete!

library(tidytext)




```


```{r}

#---- Load and Clean Data ----
  
rock_nitrogen <- read_csv("data_raw/rock_samples_SIF_results.csv")  |> 
  clean_names()

#clean up names and remove reference soil
rock_n_full <- rock_nitrogen |> 
  rename(n_ug = n_mg) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.character),
                ~ str_squish(.)  |> 
                  str_replace_all(" ", "_")  |> 
                  tolower()
                )) |> 
 mutate(
    sample_name = str_remove(sample_id, "-[pn]-\\d+$"),
    
    location = if_else(
      str_starts(sample_name, "trn|trw|brn"),
      "sedgwick",
      "SCI"
    ),
    
    rock_type = case_when(
      rock_type == "schist_from_conglomerate" ~ "blue_schist",
      sample_name == "tvs-c" ~ "vaqueros_conglomerate",
      TRUE ~ rock_type
    )
  ) |>
  filter(rock_type != "ref_soil")


#fix rock type column

rock_n <- rock_n_full |> 
  rename(lithology = rock_type) |>
  mutate(
    rock_type = case_when(
      str_detect(lithology, "_schist") ~ "blue_schist",
      lithology == "jolla_viejo_formation" ~ "jolla_viejo_sandstone",
      TRUE ~ lithology
    )
  )

summer_rocks <- rock_n |> 
  mutate(
      sample_rock = case_when(
      sample_name == "sci-blue-schist" ~ "blue_schist",
      sample_name == "brncp1" ~ "siltstone",
      sample_name == "trncp1" ~ "greenstone",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-2" ~ "serpentine",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-1" ~ "diorite",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-3" ~ "shale",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-4" ~ "basalt",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-5" ~ "soft_seds",
      sample_name %in% c("tcd-1","tcd-2","tcd-3") ~ "shale",
      sample_name %in% c("tr-1","tr-2n") ~ "shale",
      sample_name == "tjv-2" ~ "sandstone",
      sample_name == "tjv-1" ~ "sandstone",
      sample_name == "tvs-c" ~ "sandstone_conglomerate",
      sample_name == "tvs-s" ~ "sandstone",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    geologic_unit = case_when(
      sample_name == "sci-blue-schist" ~ "sc",
      sample_name == "brncp1" ~ "Qpr",
      sample_name %in% c("trncp1","trwcp1-1","trwcp1-2",
                    "trwcp1-3","trwcp1-4","trwcp1-5") ~ "f_sp-db",
      sample_name %in% c("tcd-1","tcd-2","tcd-3") ~ "Tcd",
      sample_name %in% c("tr-1","tr-2n") ~ "Tr",
      sample_name %in% c("tjv-1","tjv-2") ~ "Tjv",
      sample_name %in% c("tvs-c","tvs-s") ~ "Tvs",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |> 
  select(sample_name, sample_rock, location, geologic_unit, n_ppm, n_ug)




# Load riley data
riley_rock_n <- read_csv(("data_raw/rileyh_n_data.csv"))

# add location and cleanup riley n data
rock_riley <- riley_rock_n |> 
  rename(n_ppm = nitrogen_ppm) |> 
  mutate(
    across(where(is.character), str_to_lower),
    location = "SCI",
    sample_name = str_replace(sample_id, "-[0-9]+$", ""),
    source = "Riley"
  )

riley_n <- rock_riley |> 
  rename(lithology = rock_type) |>
  rename(n_ug = nitrogen_ug) |>
  mutate(
    rock_type = case_when(
      lithology == "sci_schist" ~ "green_schist",
      TRUE ~ lithology
    )) 



riley_rocks <- riley_n |> 
 mutate(
    
    sample_rock = case_when(
      
      str_detect(sample_name, "^grschist") ~ "green_schist",
      
      sample_name == "wdg-1" ~ "diorite",
      sample_name == "wdg-2" ~ "diorite",
      
      sample_name == "tjv-1" ~ "sandstone",
      sample_name == "tjv-2" ~ "sandstone",
      
      sample_name == "qoa-1" ~ "older_alluvium",
      
      sample_name == "tvs-s" ~ "sandstone",
      sample_name == "tvs-c" ~ "sandstone_conglomerate",
      
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tr") ~ "shale",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tcd") ~ "shale",
      
      sample_name == "montsi-1" ~ "shale",
      sample_name == "tuff-1" ~ "tuff",
      
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    
    geologic_unit = case_when(
      
      str_detect(sample_name, "^grschist") ~ "sc",
      
      str_detect(sample_name, "^wdg") ~ "wdg",
      
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tjv") ~ "Tjv",
      
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tvs") ~ "Tvs",
      
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tr") ~ "Tr",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tcd") ~ "Tcd",
      
      str_detect(sample_name, "^qoa") ~ "Qua",
      
      sample_name == "montsi-1" ~ "Tm",
      sample_name == "tuff-1" ~ "Tm",
      
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |>
  select(sample_name, sample_rock, location, geologic_unit, n_ppm, n_ug)



#join data sets
rock_all <- full_join(summer_rocks, riley_rocks) 

# adding proper x-axis name column
data_combined <- rock_all |>
  filter(sample_rock != "blue_schist") |> 
  mutate(
    rock_name = case_when(
      
      # ---- SCI ----
      sample_name %in% c("wdg-1", "wdg-2") ~ "Diorite (wdg)",
      sample_name == "tjv-1" ~ "Sandstone (Tjv)",
      sample_name == "tjv-2" ~ "Sandstone (Tjv)",
      sample_name %in% c("tvs-s") ~ "Sandstone (Tvs)",
      sample_name %in% c("tvs-c") ~ "Conglomerate (Tvs)",
      sample_name %in% c("tr-1", "tr-2n") ~ "Shale (Tr)",
      sample_name %in% c("tcd-1", "tcd-2", "tcd-3") ~ "Shale (Tcd)",
      sample_name %in% c("grschist-1", "grschist-2") ~ "Green Schist (sc)",
      sample_name == "qoa-1" ~ "Older Alluvium (Qoa)",
      sample_name == "montsi-1" ~ "Shale (Tm)",
      sample_name == "tuff-1" ~ "Tuff (Tm)",
      
 
      # ---- Sedgwick ----
      
      sample_name == "brncp1" ~ "Siltstone (Qpr)",
      sample_name == "trncp1" ~ "Greenstone (f)",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-1" ~ "Diorite (f)",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-2" ~ "Serpentine (f)",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-3" ~ "Shale (f)",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-4" ~ "Basalt (f)",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-5" ~ "Mudstone (f)",
      
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
      map_unit = case_when(
      geologic_unit == "sc"      ~ "Santa Cruz Island Schist (sc)",
      geologic_unit == "wdg"     ~ "Willows Plutonic Complex (wdg)",
      geologic_unit == "Tjv"     ~ "Jolla Viejo Formation (Tjv)",
      geologic_unit == "Tvs"     ~ "Vaqueros Formation (Tvs)",
      geologic_unit == "Tr"      ~ "Rincon Formation (Tr)",
      geologic_unit == "Tcd"     ~ "Cozy Dell Formation (Tcd)",
      geologic_unit == "Tm"      ~ "Monterey Formation (Tm)",
      geologic_unit %in% c("Qoa", "Qua") ~ "Older Alluvium (Qoa)",
      geologic_unit == "Qpr"     ~ "Paso Robles Formation (Qpr)",
      geologic_unit == "f_sp-db" ~ "Franciscan Assemblage (f-sp db f)",
      TRUE ~ geologic_unit
    )
  )




  # ---- Boxplot ---- 
data_combined |> 
  group_by(location, rock_name) |> 
 ggplot(
       aes(x = rock_name, y = n_ppm,
           color = sample_rock, fill = sample_rock)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = .8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.4), alpha = 0.6) +
    facet_grid(scales = "free_x", 
             space = "free_x",
             ~location,
             labeller = 
               as_labeller(c(
                 SCI = "Santa Cruz Island", 
                 sedgwick = "Sedgwick"))
  ) +
   scale_fill_paletteer_d("ggthemes::Miller_Stone") +
  scale_color_paletteer_d("ggthemes::Miller_Stone") +
  labs(y = "Nitrogen (ppm)") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12,face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

n_distinct(data_combined$sample_rock)
```


```{r}


data_combined |>
  mutate(
    rock_name = reorder_within(rock_name, n_ppm, location, fun = median)
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x = rock_name,
    y = n_ppm,
    fill = sample_rock,
    color = sample_rock
  )) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_grid(~location,
            scales = "free_x", 
            space = "free_x",
            labeller = 
             as_labeller(c(
               SCI = "Santa Cruz Island", 
               sedgwick = "Sedgwick"))) +
  scale_x_reordered() +   # VERY IMPORTANT
  scale_fill_paletteer_d("ggthemes::Miller_Stone") +
  scale_color_paletteer_d("ggthemes::Miller_Stone") +
  labs(y = "Nitrogen (ppm)", x = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )
  
  
```
